creator: james@nexis.net
text:
On Sun, 8 Jun 1997, Josef Karthauser wrote:

> 	I've uploaded a port of the RIPE (european ip registry) version
> 	of whois.  It is fully compatible with the default one but
> 	add extra cmd line options to get more out of their database.
> 	It also points to whois.ripe.net as default instead of to Internic.

Thanks, imported.  The only changes I made were :

- change /usr/local to ${PREFIX} in Makefile
- add manpage to MAN1 section of Makefile for compression
- add .gz suffix to manpage in pkg/PLIST

--
j.
